summary: Iteration 2 — multi-page refactor verified end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass including new TCPA consent validation (missing consent -> 400, consent=false -> 400, consent=true -> 200). /api/company correctly returns Accutek Solar, president Keith Davis, owners [Seth Davis, Quill Davis], 10 IN + 7 IL counties. Frontend: all 7 routes load (/, /services, /about, /service-area, /reviews, /tools, /contact). Page title matches spec. SPA navigation via react-router NavLink verified — URL changes without reload and active link gets aria-current='page'. Home hero headline '30 years of electrical expertise. Indiana & Illinois.' present. Services page has 4 disciplines (Solar & Storage, Backup Power, Facility Automation, Diagnostics) with sticky jump tabs. About page shows 1994 / Family-owned copy / Keith Davis / Seth Davis / Quill Davis. Service Area has 4 quadrant cards (data-testid quadrant-il-west, quadrant-in-east, quadrant-il-east, quadrant-in-west) + 4 detail cards with all counties. Reviews page renders Housecall Pro iframe. Tools page has 5 calculator tabs (solar/battery/mount/generator/roi) + 8 FAQ items (faq-trigger-0..7). Contact form: submit button is correctly disabled until consent checkbox is checked; with consent POST /api/leads returns 200 and success toast + thank-you panel render. Mobile menu (nav-mobile-toggle) opens and navigates correctly. Footer shows Accutek Solar with all sub-page links.

issues: External Housecall Pro script logs a 'TypeError: Failed to fetch' in browser console (third-party origin client.housecallpro.com). Widget iframe still renders; non-blocking but may affect curated reviews fetch on some networks.
Labels use em-dash formatting 'Central Illinois — West' rather than 'Central IL West'. Spec intent appears satisfied (user-facing readable form); just flagging for awareness.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan.
/api/leads accepts any string as email (no format validation). Switch payload.email to pydantic EmailStr.
CORS allow_origins default '*' combined with allow_credentials=True will be rejected by browsers for credentialed requests — tighten for production.
Consider adding a dedicated 404/NotFound route instead of catch-all * -> HomePage (currently any unknown path silently renders Home, which can mask broken links).
seed_data_creation: A handful of TEST_-prefixed leads and status rows inserted via the public API during pytest + Playwright runs. Filterable/cleanable by the TEST_ name prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (10 tests incl. consent). Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Contact form key testids: contact-name, contact-email, contact-phone, contact-address, contact-interest, contact-bill, contact-message, contact-consent-checkbox, contact-submit. Submit stays disabled until consent is checked, so click consent via force=True before asserting POST. Service-area quadrant testids: quadrant-{il-west,in-east,il-east,in-west} and quadrant-detail-* for the breakdown cards. Tools tabs: calc-tab-{solar,battery,mount,generator,roi}. FAQ triggers: faq-trigger-0..7. Mobile menu trigger: nav-mobile-toggle. NavLink active uses aria-current='page'. Housecall iframe third-party 'Failed to fetch' console error is cosmetic/external.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. All review_request items verified. Only minor non-blocking observations: external Housecall Pro console error and em-dash quadrant naming.
